residuals: DeployComposite 已在 browser runtime 恢復左側兵種／虎符卡區與右側行動按鈕，可再次看到戰鬥起手部署 UI；但目前仍依賴 legacy node fallback，根因是 `deploy-panel-screen` spec 載入解析失敗尚未根治。
ResultPopupComposite 目前仍依賴 legacy node fallback，根因是 `result-popup-screen` spec 載入解析失敗尚未根治。
BattleScene browser capture 仍有 ActionCommandPanel / BattleLogPanel ready timeout 警告，屬 capture-mode residual，尚未進 clean pass。
factoryLearnings: TigerTally card art itself was not the blocker; the real occlusion came from `tally_rarity_{normal|rare|epic}.png` being authored as opaque rounded bars instead of transparent frames, so stretching them to card size hid almost the entire ArtBg layer.

TigerTally card art can use transparent silhouette-first content art as long as the runtime slot keeps the frame, badge, rarity, and stats in separate layers; once the rarity overlay is a true frame, the art reads correctly without collapsing the UI hierarchy.
BattleScene non-HUD panels need design tokens loaded alongside fullScreen and i18n; otherwise token names fall through and render incorrect colors at runtime.
UIPreviewBuilder needs a post-build recursive Layout.updateLayout(true) pass; widget realignment alone does not resolve nested vertical groups like UnitInfoPanel.
F8 was blocked mainly by missing overlay image slots, not by the icon pipeline itself; once slots exist, BattleLog / ActionCommand move quickly to runtime-ready.
BattleScene QA should keep a dedicated non-HUD open-state capture in addition to the full BattleScene baseline, otherwise drawer regressions are easy to miss.
當 Composite screen spec 載入在 editor/browser runtime 解析失敗時，battle scene 至少需要 legacy scene node fallback，否則畫面可能『可開啟但不可玩』。
